description: Create a Coordination Issue in a Project

uuid.description: Coordination Issue UUID. This is an optional parameter, and is set automatically on server if not present in the payload

title.description: Coordination Issue title. The title can have a maximum of 80 characters

creation_source.description: Source of issue creation. This attribute is ignored when issue is create by third party developers.

location_id.description: Location where the issue is present. The location must be in the same project as the project_id

assignee_id.description: ID of Procore user that should be assigned the issue

coordination_issue_file_id.description: ID of the BIM File to be set as origin source (required if viewpoints is included in payload)

drawing_revision_id.description: ID of the drawing revision to be set as origin source. Only one of drawing_revision_id or coordination_issue_file_id can be present

bim_model_id.description: ID of the model to be associated

due_date.description: Due date of the Coordination Issue

issue_type.description: Issue Type of the Coordination Issue

trade_id.description: Trade associated with the Coordination Issue

origin.description: Origin source for a Coordination Issue

deep_link_url.description: Deep link URL to the origin item

items.description:
File to use as image data. Note that it's only possible to post a
file using a multipart/form-data body (see RFC 2388). Most HTTP
libraries will do the right thing when you pass in an open file or
...

viewpoints.description: An array of issue viewpoints. Only one viewpoint is allowed at this time. If specified, must also include coordination_issue_file_id.

document_container_metadata.description: Document container metadata associated with the Coordination Issue

document_container_id.description: Unique identifier of the document container

document_revision_id.description: Unique identifier of the document revision

workflows_instance_id.description: ID of the associated workflow instance
